title: BeneCane Walking Cane for Men & Women Walking Stick for Seniors Folding Canes Quad Cane Adjustable Lightweight Sturdy Free Standing Collapsible Heavy Duty with Soft TPR T-Handle and Travel Bag
features: Soft Handle: The handle is made of a comfortable TPR material that is both durable and comfortable. Designed to reduce fatigue even after long hours of use, it provides you with a soft and comfortable grip and reduces hand fatigue from prolonged use of the stick

Foldable & Lightweight Design: Weighing in at just 0.97 pounds and folding to a compact 16 inches, this walking stick is very compact. It comes with a perfect carrying bag for traveling. This practical design ensures that it is an ideal choice for travelers on the go

Stable Rubber Tip: The walking stick features a 4-pronged rotating base, providing exceptional stability and ankle protection. The rubberized base increases friction with the ground and improves stability, allowing you to walk with greater peace of mind

Free-Standing Quad Base: The base can stand freely without leaning on other objects, convenient for you to take a rest or temporarily place the stick. The four feet with strong grip can ensure the stability of the stick and won't fall down, reducing your burden

Adjustable Height: This stick's height can be easily adjusted from 31'' to 38'' using the middle button, making it ideal for individuals between 5'1" and 6'2" in height. It's an excellent choice for seniors within this height range
